name: Prune Whip Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, sugar, soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice.
2. Add the shortening to the dry ingredients and mix well using your hands or a pastry cutter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add the prune juice and milk, stirring with a fork until just combined.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Gently fold in the eggs one at a time until the batter is smooth and well combined.
6. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 inch pan or tube pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning off and removing from the pan.
